_note: Final 7 orphans, each grafted onto a documented parent already in the main tree. Real people, real relationships. Scottish kings chain Malcolm I -> Kenneth II -> Malcolm II -> Bethoc(existing, mother of Duncan I). Owen Tudor(existing) is son of Maredudd. Clement VII is the illegitimate son of Giuliano de' Medici(existing). Gregory V is son of Otto of Worms(existing). Fadrique Enriquez(existing) is son of Alfonso Enriquez.
